articles.author: Samuel Stolton
articles.title: Paramount Open to Selling Kids Channels to Quell EU Fears Over $110 Billion Warner Deal - Yahoo Finance
articles.description: (Bloomberg) -- Paramount Skydance Corp. is prepared — if necessary — to divest some children’s TV network assets to help win European Union approval of its $...
articles.content: (Bloomberg) -- Paramount Skydance Corp. is prepared if necessary to divest some childrens TV network assets to help win European Union approval of its $110 billion bid for Warner Bros. Discovery Inc.… [+5898 chars]
